title: Furnishing a Rented Flat
scenario: Your rented flat feels bare and you want it to feel like home. A full upgrade, a new sofa, a smart TV and a fridge, would cost about ₹60,000. But you may move again in a year when your lease ends, and large appliances are awkward to shift.

choices.label: Buy only essentials now and consider renting larger appliances
choices.lesson: In a rental you may move, big purchases are hard to relocate and lose value fast. Match what you own to how settled you actually are.

choices.label: Fully furnish now with a sofa, TV and fridge
choices.lesson: Upgrading a temporary home ties up a lot of cash in items you may have to sell cheaply or haul around. Comfort can wait for stability.
